data.description: Short and stout, dwarves are known as skilled warriors, miners, and workers of stone and metal. Though they stand well under 5 feet tall, dwarves are so broad and compact that they can weigh as much as a human standing nearly two feet taller.

features.name: Darkvision
features.description: Dwarves can see in dim light within 60 feet of them as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

features.name: Dwarven Resilience
features.description: A dwarf has advantage on saving throws against poison, resistance to poison damage, and is not poisoned by poison.
